SITUATIONAL: Adverse life events or life-altering events documented by a life history calendar instrument.
Involuntary job loss of the primary household earner recorded by a termination date.
Bankruptcy filing date and chapter type extracted from court docket records.
Foreclosure notice issued on the primary residence mortgage loan.
Sudden reduction of household income by fifty percent within three months.
Repossession event of a primary vehicle due to loan default.
Eviction lockout date from a rental housing property.
Business failure indicator for a sole proprietorship with zero residual income.
Major medical expense event not covered by insurance exceeding liquid assets.
Unexpected tax lien placed on personal property by a government agency.
Involuntary transfer of a home to a lender via deed in lieu.
Pension fund collapse leading to loss of anticipated retirement income.
Identity theft event causing fraudulent credit accounts and asset seizure.
Sudden disqualification from unemployment benefit extension period.
Loss of alimony or child support payments due to obligor disappearance.
Cessation of a long-term disability insurance payment after policy termination.
Principal residence destroyed by a fire without replacement cost coverage.
Major stock portfolio loss exceeding forty percent in a single month.
Uninsured casualty loss of essential business equipment from a natural event.
Bank account garnishment order executed against all liquid funds.
Commodity price shock rendering a family farm unprofitable overnight.
Abolition of a primary industry subsidy causing immediate firm layoffs.
Loss of a professional license required for the primary occupation.
Sudden rent increase forcing relocation beyond affordable threshold.
Unexpected expiry of term life insurance with no conversion privilege.
Spousal death certificate date from a sudden fatal accident.
Child diagnosed with a life-threatening illness requiring full-time care.
Parent with dementia is placed into a full-time nursing facility.
Divorce decree finalized after a contested legal proceeding.
Emergency custody order is issued by a family court judge.
Unplanned pregnancy confirmed by a medical test after contraceptive failure.
Sudden permanent disability diagnosis for a working-age family member.
Missing person report is filed with a law enforcement agency.
Substance abuse crisis requiring an emergency rehabilitation admission.
Adolescent arrested for a felony offense and detained in a juvenile facility.
Family home rendered uninhabitable by a toxic mold infestation.
Domestic violence protective order is served against a household member.
Sudden infant death syndrome tragedy documented by a coroner report.
Military deployment order for a sole caregiver in a single-parent household.
Severe allergic reaction event requiring a hospitalization without an epinephrine supply.
Suicide of a cohabiting family member recorded by a vital statistics office.
Kidnapping of a child by a non-custodial parent reported to authorities.
Life support machine withdrawal decision after a prolonged vegetative state.
Unexpected inheritance dispute blocking access to previously pledged funds.
Sudden immigration deportation order for the primary financial provider.
Emergency psychiatric hold for an unaccompanied minor due to self-harm.
Mass shooting event at a workplace resulting in a family member fatality.
Sudden custody reversal after a false allegation investigation.
Unanticipated pregnancy complications leading to a preterm birth emergency.
Parental abandonment incident with no advance notice or contact.
A lawsuit for personal injury damages is served upon the policyholder.
A grand jury indictment is handed down for a white-collar crime.
A tax audit assessment notice demands repayment of years of credits.
A civil restraining order prohibits contact with a key business partner.
A court-ordered asset freeze is placed on all brokerage accounts.
An adverse possession claim is filed against a parcel of family land.
A probation violation warrant is issued for a household member.
A class action settlement opt-out deadline is missed by the claimant.
A patent infringement suit is initiated against a small business product line.
A contractor's lien is filed on a home for unpaid renovation debt.
A wage garnishment order for student loan default is enforced.
A non-compete injunction blocks the primary earner from new employment.
A zoning violation notice is posted on a commercial property by the city.
A cease-and-desist letter is delivered for an alleged trademark violation.
A temporary guardianship order is signed by a judge without family consent.
A court-ordered paternity test result changes a child's legal parentage.
An eminent domain seizure of a front yard for a highway project.
A massive IRS penalty is assessed for an incorrect foreign asset report.
A search warrant is executed on a home office for alleged fraud.
A defamation suit is filed against the family's small online business.
A divorce decree includes a retroactive spousal support lump sum.
A corporate dissolution is ordered by a court for partnership deadlock.
An arbitration award imposes a debt obligation previously disputed.
A conservatorship is imposed over an elderly relative's entire estate.
A conditional discharge from military service requires recoupment of bonus.
A criminal restitution order is attached to future earnings for years.
Total loss of a home from a wildfire without a habitable structure remaining.
Floodwater exceeds a finished floor elevation by more than three feet.
Earthquake causes structural collapse of a condominium building assessed as unsafe.
Tornado destroys a roof and all interior contents of the primary residence.
Hurricane storm surge inundates a coastal property with saltwater corrosion.
Lightning strike ignites a gas leak explosion in a detached garage.
Mudslide buries the only access road to a mountain property for months.
Volcanic ashfall collapses the roof of a farm equipment storage barn.
Sinkhole opens beneath a residential foundation swallowing a bedroom.
Severe hail event shatters all windows and skylights on a dwelling.
Tsunami wave washes away a beachfront home down to the pilings.
Dam failure floods a downstream community with no advance warning.
Ice dam rupture causes water infiltration through every ceiling cavity.
Severe subsidence from abandoned mine works cracks the basement slab.
Blizzard collapses a commercial greenhouse structure under snow load.
Radioactive contamination from a nearby accident renders a farm uninhabitable.
Pest infestation of invasive termites requires whole-house fumigation and replacement.
Theft of all copper wiring and plumbing from a vacant rental unit.
Vandalism with heavy machinery destroys a small business storefront facade.
Aircraft crash into a residential neighborhood obliterates a house entirely.
Oil pipeline rupture contaminates a private well and surrounding soil.
Severe wind shear blows down a heritage oak tree onto a garage.
Chemical spill from a train derailment forces permanent evacuation zone.
Forest fire smoke damage permeates every porous surface of a dwelling.
Avalanche buries a mountain cabin under twenty feet of debris.
